notes: Render the approved X32 master image inside a relative positioned container.
Render each hotspot as an absolute positioned transparent button.
Use rect percentages for left, top, width and height.
Coordinates are first pass and should be tuned visually after first browser render.

hotspots.name: TRACK L
hotspots.purpose: Scene label: TRACK L. Training category corrected to Band / Instruments.
hotspots.routingSummary: Input channel on the X32. Inputs 1-32 are sent to the Dante network for the Logic Pro livestream workflow. Channels can also feed Main LR, monitor mixes, P16 mixes and FX sends where assigned.
commonIssues: Gain too low or too high
Missing from Dante or Logic input

hotspots.name: BVS
hotspots.purpose: Controls the relative level of the BVS group without changing individual channel processing.
hotspots.routingSummary: DCA controls grouped channel level. It is not an audio bus and does not route sound by itself.
commonIssues: Operator moves channel fader instead of group

hotspots.name: LVS
hotspots.purpose: Controls the relative level of the LVS group without changing individual channel processing.
hotspots.routingSummary: DCA controls grouped channel level. It is not an audio bus and does not route sound by itself.
commonIssues: Operator moves channel fader instead of group

hotspots.name: SIDE FILL
hotspots.purpose: FOH side fill feed. Side fill is part of the FOH system.
hotspots.routingSummary: Matrix output used to feed a specific zone or destination from main or mix sources.

hotspots.name: OVERFLOW
hotspots.purpose: Audio feed for the overflow area.
hotspots.routingSummary: Matrix output used to feed a specific zone or destination from main or mix sources.

hotspots.name: VICTORYLAND
hotspots.routingSummary: Matrix output used to feed a specific zone or destination from main or mix sources.

hotspots.name: LIVESTREAM L
hotspots.purpose: Alternate livestream matrix left reference from scene. Confirm active usage.
hotspots.routingSummary: Matrix output used to feed a specific zone or destination from main or mix sources.

hotspots.name: LIVESTREAM R
hotspots.purpose: Alternate livestream matrix right reference from scene. Confirm active usage.
hotspots.routingSummary: Matrix output used to feed a specific zone or destination from main or mix sources.

hotspots.name: DRUM VERB
hotspots.routingSummary: FX send controls how much signal is sent to the effect. FX return controls how much effect is heard.
commonIssues: Wrong vocal sent to delay or reverb

hotspots.name: VOCAL REVERB
hotspots.routingSummary: FX send controls how much signal is sent to the effect. FX return controls how much effect is heard.
commonIssues: Wrong vocal sent to delay or reverb

hotspots.name: VOCAL DELAY
hotspots.routingSummary: FX send controls how much signal is sent to the effect. FX return controls how much effect is heard.
commonIssues: Wrong vocal sent to delay or reverb

hotspots.name: MAIN LR
hotspots.purpose: Main left/right output feeding the FOH system via the subwoofer and house speakers.
hotspots.routingSummary: Main LR to Subwoofer to FOH Left, Centre, Right and Side Fill.

hotspots.name: X32 Screen
hotspots.purpose: Main console screen used for channel processing, routing, meters, scenes and setup pages.
hotspots.routingSummary: Future sprints can split this into EQ, dynamics, routing, meters and scenes.
